clothing.description:
Premium quality cotton hoodie designed for everyday comfort and versatility. Made from 320 GSM French Terry fabric with an 80/20 cotton-polyester blend for optimal softness and durability.

Key Features:
- Breathable and moisture-wicking fabric
- Anti-shrink treatment for long-lasting fit
- Eco-friendly dyes and sustainable production
- Classic pullover design with adjustable drawstring hood
- Kangaroo front pocket for convenience
- Ribbed cuffs and hem for a secure fit

Available in multiple colors and sizes (S-3XL). Custom logo printing, embroidery, and private label services available. Ideal for retail, promotional events, and corporate branding.

Premium slim fit jeans crafted from stretch denim for maximum comfort and style. The classic blue wash and tailored fit make these jeans a wardrobe essential.

Key Features:
- 2% spandex for comfortable stretch and movement
- Classic blue wash with subtle fading details
- Slim fit through hip and thigh with tapered leg
- Durable zipper fly with button closure
- Five-pocket styling
- Anti-wrinkle treatment for easy care

Available in waist sizes 28-40 and inseam lengths 30-34. Custom wash, branding, and hardware options available for bulk orders.

clothing.description:
Premium down vest filled with 90% white duck down for exceptional warmth without the bulk. The lightweight, packable design makes it perfect for layering in autumn and winter.

Key Features:
- 600+ fill power for superior insulation
- 80g fill weight provides optimal warmth-to-weight ratio
- Quilted construction prevents down shifting
- Water-resistant ripstop nylon shell
- Full-zip front with stand collar
- Two side zip pockets
- Packs into included compression pouch

Available in sizes S-3XL. Custom colors and branding available. Ideal for outdoor retailers and corporate gifts.

fragrance.description:

- Heart Notes: Orange Blossom
- Base Notes: White Musk, Cedar
- Concentration: Eau de Toilette (EDT)

- Sillage: Moderate

Perfect for daily wear and warm weather. Custom bottle design, labeling, and gift box options available for bulk orders. Ideal for retail, gifting, and private label brands.
